message:
fix: Copy sysconfigdata to cpython/Lib for stdlib bundling in CI

The _sysconfigdata__wasi_wasm32-wasi.py module is generated during the
WASM build at build/zig-wasi/build/lib.wasi-wasm32-3.13/ but not present
in the cpython/Lib/ source tree. Copy it after build so
generate-stdlib-fs.ts can include it. This fixes pydantic's zoneinfo
import chain which calls sysconfig.get_config_var("TZPATH").

files.patch:
@@ -83,6 +83,8 @@ jobs:
             ./scripts/build-phase2.sh
           fi
           cp build/zig-wasi/python.wasm worker/src/python.wasm
+          # Copy generated sysconfigdata to cpython/Lib for generate-stdlib-fs.ts
+          cp build/zig-wasi/build/lib.wasi-wasm32-3.13/_sysconfigdata__wasi_wasm32-wasi.py cpython/Lib/ 2>/dev/null || true
 
       - name: Cache numpy build
         uses: actions/cache@v4

@@ -117,9 +117,6 @@ for mod_path, init_func in r.get('modules', {}).items():
     SITE_ZIP="$ROOT_DIR/build/recipes/$recipe_name/${recipe_name}-site-packages.zip"
     if [ -f "$SITE_ZIP" ]; then
         SITE_PACKAGES+=("$SITE_ZIP")
-        echo "  [$recipe_name] Site-packages: $SITE_ZIP"
-    else
-        echo "  [$recipe_name] No site-packages zip at: $SITE_ZIP"
     fi
 done
